case_title: MCKESSON HBOC INC VS. NELLIE DBA ROSE ENTERPRIS ROSE et al

docket_entries.description: CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCKESSON HBOC INC AS TO DEFENDANT ROSE, NELLIE DBA ROSE ENTERPRIS 1-50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-26-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-22-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-29-2002

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT ROSE, NELLIE DBA ROSE ENTERPRIS
AMENDED REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $336.45 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ROSE, NELLIE DBA ROSE ENTERPRIS

DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT 1-50
STATUS CONFERENCE OF APR-26-2002 CONTINUED TO JUN-07-2002 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROSE, NELLIE DBA ROSE ENTERPRIS $17,381.71 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $3,599.12 INTEREST, $336.45 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $21,977.28, PRINCIPAL $ 17,381.72 TOTAL $ 21,977.29 SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ROSE, NELLIE DBA ROSE ENTERPRIS
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MCKESSON HBOC INC
STATUS CONFERENCE OF JUN-07-2002 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ENTERED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
